/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/compiler_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/compiler_tests.dir/tests/lexer_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/compiler_tests.dir/tests/parser_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/compiler_tests.dir/tests/codegen_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/compiler_tests.dir/tests/codegen_segments_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/compiler_tests.dir/tests/codegen_zeropage_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/compiler_tests.dir/tests/codegen_o65_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/compiler_tests.dir/tests/codegen_integration_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/compiler_tests.dir/src/compiler/lexer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/compiler_tests.dir/src/compiler/parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/compiler_tests.dir/src/compiler/codegen.cpp.o -o compiler_tests  lib/libgtest_main.a lib/libgtest.a
